title: NodeId::ula_addr + Node::handle_frame (ICMPv6 Echo responder)
description: Two small additions to close the 7ry exit criteria. (1) NodeId::ula_addr(prefix: [u8;8]) -> Ipv6Addr — derives a node's ULA/GUA address from a /64 prefix (prefix || EUI-64-IID), satisfying 'ULA addresses work'. (2) Node::handle_frame(schc_frame, reply) -> usize — decompresses an incoming SCHC frame, detects ICMPv6 Echo Request addressed to this node, builds and compresses an Echo Reply into the caller's buffer, satisfying 'nodes can ping'.
